name: vmprint-workspace
description: Deterministic typesetting engine for the programmable web. Pure-JS, zero-browser document composition with bit-perfect PDF output.
author: cosmiciron

scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=contracts && npm run build --workspace=engine && npm run build --workspace=preview && npm run build --workspace=cli
scripts.release:build: npm run build --workspace=contracts && npm run build --workspace=engine && npm run build --workspace=preview && npm run build --workspace=cli
scripts.test: npm run test --prefix engine && npm run docs:build && npm run test:packaged-integration
